title: Planning Packet fields are report-only and do not flow into /spec_kit:plan
summary: Deep-review synthesis requires new Planning Packet fields, but the plan command does not explicitly consume those fields.

title: Deep-review iteration/state contract does not collect report-required fix-completeness fields
summary: The final report must emit findingClass, scopeProofNeeded, and affectedSurfaceHints, but iteration artifacts and JSONL state do not require or preserve them.

title: Plan command inline scaffold renders only the FIX ADDENDUM heading
summary: The manifest has the full affected-surfaces table/inventory for all four levels, but the plan command scaffold only carries the addendum heading.
